message:
Add configurable verification methods for interactive prompts

- Support "code", "command", and "none" verification methods
- Add require_env option for conditional interactive mode
- Add disable_in_ci configuration option
- Improve error messages for unavailable interactive mode
- Update beads issue tracking

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
